metadata.title: Appie — Your personal Techwiz | Weblyfe.ai
metadata.description: Hi, I'm Appie. Your personal Techwiz. A genius employee at the lowest cost — I handle the work eating your week. Inbox, intake, scheduling, admin. From €65.

hero.subline: A genius employee at the lowest cost. I handle the work eating your week. Inbox. Intake. Scheduling. Admin.
hero.kicker: You build. I keep the lights on.
hero.microcopy: A Techwiz is supposed to take work out of your week. Not money out of your wallet. If your time log after 30 days doesn't show 10 hours saved, your €250 back plus €100 for your time. One message and it moves.

bridge.line1: It's 5:30. You still have 47 unread emails.
bridge.line2: The office closes. The week doesn't.
bridge.line3: That's what Appie was built for.

meetAppie.title: What a day with Appie sounds like
meetAppie.subtitle: Four real messages from a customer Telegram. Nothing scripted.

bubbles.text: Morning. Cleared 23 emails overnight (drafts in Sent). 4 need you: 2 quote requests, 1 partnership, 1 invoice dispute.
Sandra wants to move Thursday. No conflict — shifted to 14:00, asked her to confirm.
WhatsApp from Mark, kitchen renovation in Rotterdam, budget 25k. Within service radius. Lead pushed to Brevo + Monday, intake questions sent.
Reconciled 6 invoices in Moneybird. No discrepancies. Reply "show me" + topic if you want context.

founder.label: Who built Appie
founder.name: Seyed Hosseini
founder.p1: I started in medicine. Then I built an agency — Weblyfe — to tell the right stories for growing brands. Three years later our entire agency runs on a fleet of AI teammates we built ourselves.
founder.p2: Appie is the spin-off. The version I sell to clients. What you see here? The same thing that runs our own inbox, intake, and admin.

cza.headline: WhatsApp intake that doesn't sleep.
cza.body: Inbound WhatsApp leads used to wait 4-6 hours. Sjaak — a Custom Appie — picks them up in seconds, qualifies within a ±50 km service radius, and writes the lead straight into Brevo, Monday and Moneybird simultaneously.
cza.metricsNote: Numbers being confirmed with Hesam — landing on the full case page.

dubaiProperty.headline: Lead qualification across 752 inbound leads.
dubaiProperty.body: Eva is the Custom Appie for Dubai-Property. She scores new inbound leads, qualifies against the ICP, and routes hot leads to the sales team — first reply within minutes, day or night.
dubaiProperty.metricsNote: Customer quote and hard numbers being confirmed by Sandjai and Priscilla.

safesite.headline: Whole site built in one day, via voice notes.
safesite.body: Shay told Appie what his business does over Telegram voice notes. A day later a full company site was live. No designer handoff, no meetings — just brief, build, ship.

customAppies.label: Custom-built Appies
customAppies.title: For specific setups, we build it bespoke
customAppies.subtitle: Six examples of Custom Appies already running for customers and internally. From €2,000/month. What would your Techwiz do?

outcomes.title: What Appie does for you
outcomes.subtitle: Five areas where your Techwiz runs on her own.

inbox.label: Inbox
inbox.desc: Triage, drafts, replies on low-risk mail. Risky stuff pings you in Telegram first.

intake.label: Intake
intake.desc: Qualify WhatsApp / form / email leads and push them straight into your CRM.

scheduling.label: Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Find slots, send invites, reschedule, decline politely.

admin.label: Admin
admin.desc: Reconcile invoices in Moneybird, log expenses, daily summary.

memory.label: Memory
memory.desc: Remembers customer preferences, your tone, prior decisions — across sessions.

demo.title: Two minutes with a real customer
demo.subtitle: Not a demo. Not a scripted prospect. A Loom recording of a live workflow.
demo.voiceNote: Voice clip placeholder · local OSS TTS (Coqui XTTS-v2) being wired

features: Your own server, your own Appie

custom.name: Custom Appie
custom.subtitle: Eva, Sjaak, Shay's Appie — we build your version

garantie.label: Guarantee
garantie.headline: If Appie doesn't save you 10 hours in your first month, you get your €250 back plus an extra €100.
garantie.copy: A Techwiz is supposed to take work out of your week. Not money out of your wallet. If your time log after 30 days doesn't show 10 hours saved, your €250 back plus €100 for your time. One message and it moves.
garantie.mechanic: Requires: ≥1 connected channel + 5 weekly tasks dispatched. Trigger window day 25-35. Refund + bonus within 5 business days.

items.q: How is Appie different from ChatGPT?
items.a: ChatGPT is a chat window with no memory. Appie has persistent memory, runs on your own server, and does work on her own — without you having to type a prompt every time.

items.q: What if I want a human in the loop?
items.a: Always you. Appie never settles a payment, contract or new hire on her own without you. Anything risky goes to Telegram for your sign-off first. You can flag any topic as "ask first".
Appie runs on a dedicated private server. Your conversations and data don't train public models. Encrypted connections, secure API handling, no unnecessary storage.
Instant Appie is live within 24 hours — we handle everything. Build Your Own Appie takes a few hours of your own time with the PDF.

items.q: What tools does Appie work with?
items.a: Google Workspace, Notion, Telegram, WhatsApp, Stripe, Brevo, Moneybird, Monday, HubSpot, Airtable, n8n, Webflow. If a tool has an API, Appie talks to it.

items.q: What if Appie does something wrong?
items.a: Failsafes built in. Risky actions ping you first, complex edge cases route to a human, and you always have override controls. Plus 30 days of support after launch.
Yes. Monthly cancellation, no contract. And if the satisfied-or-money-back guarantee applies, you get your €250 back without a fight.

items.q: What if I already have tools in place?
items.a: Appie becomes the layer that connects everything. Not a replacement — an orchestrator that absorbs and operates your existing stack.
